results.name: Salivary amylase
results.prediction_scope: Folded object: one salivary amylase protein chain; Ca2+/Cl- and substrate are not predicted.
results.omitted_context: Reference preview is protein chain A only; cofactors, waters, and partner molecules are stripped unless a real result supplies them.

results.name: GFP
results.prediction_scope: Folded object: one GFP protein chain; chromophore chemistry is not modeled by the sequence-only fold.
results.omitted_context: Reference preview is protein chain A only; waters and chromophore/ligand records are stripped so the preview matches the predicted object.

results.name: Myoglobin
results.prediction_scope: Folded object: one myoglobin protein chain; the heme group is not predicted.
results.omitted_context: Reference preview is chain A protein atoms only, keeping the Mol* object aligned with the monomer prediction.

results.name: Carbonic anhydrase
results.prediction_scope: Folded object: one carbonic anhydrase II protein chain; catalytic Zn2+ is not predicted.
results.omitted_context: Reference preview is chain A protein atoms only; the metal is an important biological context note, not part of the predicted coordinate output.

results.name: Phosphoglycerate kinase
results.prediction_scope: Folded object: one PGK protein chain, benchmarked with a deliberately shallow MSA.
results.omitted_context: Reference preview is chain A protein atoms only; substrate and nucleotide state are not modeled.

results.name: Adenylate kinase
results.prediction_scope: Folded object: one adenylate kinase chain; ligand-bound open/closed states are biological context, not a folding movie.
results.omitted_context: Reference preview is 4AKE chain A only; chain B, waters, and ligands are stripped so the preview matches the single-chain prediction.
